description: Testing display and behavior of fixed text/labels that are hardcoded in the application.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check fixed text/label displays corresponding with design, spec

Ex: Title of page, Label of item, ...
expected_result:
Display correctly as design/spec
+ Position
+ Format
+ Value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check fixed text/label unable to edit on screen
expected_result: Can not edit text by action on screen

item_type: Text which is set in Config file
description: Testing display and behavior of text that is configured through configuration files.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check text/label display corresponding with config file

Ex: address, copyright, ...
expected_result:
Display correctly as design/spec
+ Position
+ Format
+ Value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check fixed text/label unable to edit on screen
expected_result: Can not edit text by action on screen

description: Testing display and behavior of database-driven text, including various character types, formats, and scrolling behavior.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when text display fully on screen
expected_result:
Display correctly as value on database
+ Position
+ Format
+ Value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when text display in preview mode, not fully
expected_result:
Display correctly as value on database and truncate <n character>
+ Position
+ Format
+ Value is truncated <n characters>

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of text with below data
+ [Not required item] NULL
+ Only spaces
+ Number
+ Date time
+ English characters contain space
+ English characters not contain space
+ Has Lower cases characters
+ Has Upper cases characters
+ Emotion 
+ Symbol
+ Has half-width Japanese characters
+ Has full-width Japanese characters
+ Has tags (in SEO)
+ Hashtag
+ HTML tags Ex: break line, hyper link, ...
+ Break line characters Ex: /n, /r, /r/n
+ Format tags
+ Programming languages
expected_result:
Display correctly as value on database
+ Position
+ Format
+ Value
+ When text contains HTML tags, not display HTML tags, only displays text with correct format/style
+ When text contains Break line characters, not display break line characters, only displays text with correct format/style
+ When text contains format tags, not display format tags, only displays text with correct format/style

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check display of text when has lines

+ Has N-1 lines
[N: the line number that the vertical scroll appears - Base on each spec]
+ Has N lines
+ Has N+1 lines
expected_result:
+ Not display vertical bar when have < = N-1 
    Scroll up/down function is not effect.

+ Only display vertical bar when have >=  N line
+ Scroll up/down function is effect.

+ Display correctly value on database
+ Layout is not broken

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check fixed text/label is unable to edit on screen
expected_result: Can not edit text by action on screen
